allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.binance.com/api/v3/ticker/24hr" --max-time 15 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(curl -s "https://api.alternative.me/fng/?limit=1" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('FNG:', d['data'][0]['value'], d['data'][0]['value_classification']\)")
